title: turraea somaliensis
intro: Turraea somaliensis, also known as Somali Turraea, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae, native to East Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of various bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Turraea somaliensis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. Turraea somaliensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which are typically prepared by boiling the plant material in water to extract its active compounds.
